sys_ws_operation.description: GET handler for the Case Status Lookup scripted REST API. Anonymously accepts a case number via the 'number' query parameter from the Experience Portal lookup widget. Delegates to x_casemgmt.CasePortalService.lookupCase() which queries x_casemgmt_case by number and returns ONLY the whitelisted fields { status, subject, opened_date } - never assigned_group, assigned_agent, description, closed_date, requester_* fields, priority, type, pending_reason, or any audit field. On match, returns HTTP 200 with body { status, subject, opened_date }. On no match (or empty/missing query parameter), returns HTTP 404 with the verbatim body { error: 'No case found with that number.' } per AAP Section 0.7.4. Replaces ArkCase's GetCaseByNumberServiceImpl.getCaseByNumber() Spring service. Anonymous access is enabled by setting requires_authentication=false, requires_acl_authorization=false, and requires_snc_internal_role=false; the privacy perimeter is the field whitelist in the Script Include, not table-level ACLs.
sys_ws_operation.name: Case Status Lookup GET
sys_ws_operation.short_description: Anonymous GET handler for case status lookup. Returns HTTP 200 with whitelisted fields { status, subject, opened_date } on match, or HTTP 404 with verbatim body { error: 'No case found with that number.' } on no-match per AAP Section 0.7.4.
